name: Tealtrian Ephemera
description: Distinguish yourself with the essence of nobility.

languages.description: Hebe dich hervor durch diese Essenz des Adels.
languages.name: Ephemera: Tealtrian

languages.description: Distinguez-vous par l'essence même de la noblesse.
languages.name: Ephemera Tealtrian

languages.description: Destaca con la esencia de la nobleza.
languages.name: Efímero Tealtrian

languages.description: 高貴さで自身を際立たせよう。
languages.name: Tealtrian エフェメラ

languages.description: Destaque-se com a essência da nobreza.
languages.name: Efêmera: Tealtriana

languages.description: 以高貴的精髓，彰顯你出類拔萃。
languages.name: 縈舞幻紋

languages.description: สร้างความโดดเด่นให้ตนเองด้วยหัวใจแห่งความสง่างาม
languages.name: อิเฟมเมอรา Tealtrian
